cross_scene_arcs.title: Alliance with Marcus
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Kyle recruits Marcus as a travel companion and solidifies their group's mission to find the Resistance and fight for John Connor.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Traveling with Star, seeking shelter and recruiting Marcus
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Marcus accepted as ally, group committed to finding Resistance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether they will successfully find the Resistance

cross_scene_arcs.title: Connection to John Connor
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Kyle hears Connor's inspiring broadcast, meets him in person, and learns about his mother, strengthening his personal bond with the resistance leader.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hearing John Connor's radio broadcast, excited and inspired
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Under resistance protection, holding photo of his mother Sarah

cross_scene_arcs.title: Captivity and Escape from Skynet
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Kyle is captured by Skynet, his neural data approved for processing, confirmed as integrated into the network, but is freed by Marcus and escapes the facility.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Captured and unconscious in Skynet transport
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Escaping the lab with Marcus and Star

cross_scene_arcs.title: Physical and Identity Transformation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marcus consents to body donation, is executed, revived, and discovered to be a terminator/hybrid, leading to an identity crisis.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Alive on death row, consenting to Project Angel
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Alive and aware of his hybrid nature
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to reconcile human memories with a machine body

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bond with Kyle and Star
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marcus meets Kyle and Star, forms an alliance, shares his past, and commits to protecting them, risking his life to save them.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Determined to save Kyle and Star
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether he can successfully protect them

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rejection of Skynet and Acceptance of Resistance Role
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After learning Kyle and Star's fate, Marcus disconnects from Skynet and agrees to become John Connor to continue the fight.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Free from Skynet and committed to the Resistance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The execution of the transformation and his effectiveness as Connor

cross_scene_arcs.title: Trust Building with Marcus
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Star's relationship with Marcus evolves from initial distrust to emotional bonding, rescue, and ultimate acceptance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Distrustful of Marcus, questioning his inclusion in the group.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Accepts Marcus as an ally, hugs him after he saves her.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Captivity and Liberation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Star is captured by cannibals and machines, imprisoned, branded, processed, rejected for neural testing, and finally freed by Marcus.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Freed from containment and escaping the facility.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Exposure to Machine War
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Star learns about radiation and hunter-killers, witnesses destruction and hears John Connor's broadcast, and later engages in combat against a Terminator.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Unaware of the full extent of machine threats.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Informed about the resistance and capable of fighting machines.
